Appearances:
Plaintiff Douris Reed, is present.
Attorney, Karen Uchiyama, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Jose Lopez-Pritz and Rosemary Fuentes, are present.
Attorney, Jerome Schweich , representing the defendant through full scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Al Anolik, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of OCT-12-2010 remains on calendar.
